intentSynonyms: get a group invite link in whatsapp
look up a group invite link in whatsapp
fetch a single group invite link in whatsapp
view one specific group invite link in whatsapp
get group invite link in whatsapp

chat_id.description: Group chat ID (must be a group chat)
